name: python3-git-big-picture
title: python3-git-big-picture
description:
Visualization tool for Git repositories (module)
git-big-picture is a visualization tool for Git repositories. You can think of
it as a filter that removes uninteresting commits from a DAG modelling a Git
repository and thereby exposes the big picture: for example the hierarchy of
tags and branches. git-big-picture supports convenience output options and can
filter different classes of commits. It uses the Graphviz utility to render
images that are pleasing to the eye.
.
This package contains the Python module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-git-big-picture because Visualization tool for Git repositories (module).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-git-big-picture as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-git-big-picture with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-git-big-picture --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
